summary: Jam‑focused performance highlighted by an extended New Potato; recording source isn’t specified but the show is praised as very good.
review: Both reviewers gave the recording five stars, emphasizing a strong, jam‑oriented set that benefited from the one‑hour Avalon time limit. The extended version of “New Potato” is singled out as a sweet highlight, while no specific comments on sound quality were provided, leaving the technical side unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are five‑star and focus on excellent musical performance; lack of recording‑quality details keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned sound clarity, mix, or source type; rating inferred from overall positive assessment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The one‑hour set limit at the Avalon prompted tighter pacing toward the end, but reviewers felt it kept the music flowing and resulted in strong jam sections.
